chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1375 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case. 06-03-2024 Mr. Rahmat Ali Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G a/w Jamiat Mal, Assistant Engineer (Div), Public Health Engineering Sub-Division-II, Ghotki. ***** Assistant Engineer, Public Health Engineering Sub-Division-II, Ghotki is present and submits that PC-1 has been prepared for the construction of road of the village of petitioner, as requested it has been approved by the Deputy Commissioner and has been sent to the Secretary concerned. As soon as approval is accorded, the construction of road would start. This petition apparently has served its purpose and is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
